description_long: This is a cylindrical yellow barrel with a slightly marbled texture and prominent black hazard markings. Around its circumference, there are repeating black triangular symbols, each containing a trefoil, indicating radioactivity. On one side, a large triangular warning sign with a skull and crossbones is visible, suggesting the contents are highly toxic or dangerous. The top of the barrel also features a triangular warning symbol, reinforcing its hazardous nature. The barrel appears to be made of a hard, possibly metal material, and is sealed with a fitted lid. Its design and markings suggest it is intended for the storage or transport of hazardous materials, likely in an industrial or urban setting.
description: A yellow cylindrical barrel with black radioactive and toxic warning symbols, sealed with a fitted lid and a marbled texture.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from an angle showing the marbled yellow surface, black radioactive symbols, and the top warning triangle.
description_view_1: This view highlights the large triangular skull and crossbones warning sign on the side, along with the repeating radioactive symbols.
description_view_2: The side view shows the repeating radioactive symbols and a partial view of the warning triangle, with less emphasis on the skull symbol.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this angle also displays the skull and crossbones warning sign and the repeating radioactive symbols.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive symbols, skull and crossbones warning sign, triangular hazard markings
